task_completion.description: Access the Ekylibre application and log in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the Ekylibre dashboard or login screen at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the equipment or asset creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for creating a new equipment/asset is visible in the Ekylibre web interface.
The text 'Massey Ferguson 7720' is typed into the Name (or equivalent) field on the equipment creation form.
The text 'MF-7720-01' is typed into the Work Number (or equivalent) field on the equipment creation form.

task_completion.description: Select an appropriate tractor variant or nature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field for nature/variant shows a value related to 'tractor', 'tracteur', 'equipment', or 'équipement'.
A success message indicating the equipment was created, or the saved equipment record page displaying the entered details.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Ekylibre UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Ekylibre application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre interface is visible, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to insert the record directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or database client interfaces are used to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected equipment name is 'Massey Ferguson 7720'. The expected work number is 'MF-7720-01'. The selected nature/variant must match keywords like 'tractor', 'tracteur', 'equipment', or 'équipement'. The correct login credentials are admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678.
